reference: Hi, thank you for asking. I really appreciate your concern. Stress can cause anything and not just numbness. There is no need to worry about Bell's palsy because this may not be due to the stress. I hope this information helps you. Have a good day.
text: Hi, thank you for asking. I really appreciate your concern. Stress can cause anything and not just numbness. There is no need to worry about both, truly, because there's no long-ended stress. I hope this information helps you. Have a good day.
